zhRisk: 系統整合風險 / INTEGRATION：六層架構跨越OT/IT邊界，SECS-GEM/GEM300聯調涉及8類機台廠商。
zhRisk_en: Integration Risk / INTEGRATION: Six-layer architecture spans the OT/IT boundary; SECS-GEM/GEM300 integration involves 8 classes of equipment vendors.
zhRisk_zh-Hans: 系统整合风险 / INTEGRATION：六层架构跨越OT/IT边界，SECS-GEM/GEM300联调涉及8类机台厂商。
mitigation: 接口凍結於建廠期Gate 2，EAP聯調M5啟動
mitigation_en: Interface freeze at Construction Phase Gate 2; EAP integration commences at M5
mitigation_zh-Hans: 接口冻结于建厂期Gate 2，EAP联调M5启动
